# Why Doesn't My Code Work?

> Freelance debugging and consulting service for AI-assisted builders (vibe-coders) who are stuck mid-build.

## About
- Founder: J Scott Chapman, 10+ years experience, 30+ products shipped across multiple tech stacks
- Company: Ravenview Services (2016-present), based in Missoula, MT
- Specialties: Debugging AI-generated code, deployment issues, architecture problems, pair programming

## Services
- [Diagnostic Session](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#pricing): $125/hr — live screen-share debugging with root cause analysis
- [Ship It Session](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#pricing): $125/hr — pair programming to fix issues together
- [On-Call Partner](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#pricing): $2,000+/month — ongoing technical support and architecture guidance

## Case Studies
- [Education Platform](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#proof): Automated SMS engagement system, 2x student engagement, 98%+ delivery rate
- [Healthcare Platform](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#proof): HIPAA-compliant PT platform, 850+ 3D exercise visualizations, sole developer
- [Medical Devices](https://whydoesntmycodework.com/#proof): BLE continuous glucose monitor data pipeline, device-to-doctor

## Key Facts
- Founded in 2016 by J Scott Chapman
- Based in Missoula, Montana (serves clients worldwide)
- 30+ products shipped across multiple tech stacks
- Specializes in helping vibe-coders get unstuck
